svg.title: ModelGuard System Design — Corrected
svg.desc: OpenAI (the AI company) is the user. It sends batch prompt data via POST from a SwaggerAI frontend to the ModelGuard backend, which runs attack detection and logs results to MinIO.
svg.text: AI company (e.g. OpenAI) is the client — sends batch data via POST for attack detection
receives batch → runs detector → returns results
Q: Is this prompt an attack?
Health · Audit · Reports — admin JWT auto-login
All services in one compose network
